emails.subject: Letter Agreement
emails.body: Letter Agreement Dave, Attached is a rough draft of the letter we discussed. The right to match option is a little less drastic than the "saving sharing" we discussed. The savings sharing is a little more problematic to enforce. We can discuss though, if that is really the way you want to go. Please review and lets discuss.

emails.subject: Re: Letter Agreement
emails.body: Re: Letter Agreement Gerald, Would you please have a look at this term sheet.
